name: 内格夫 | 动力装载机
nameZh: 内格夫 | 动力装载机
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. It has been custom painted with a hydrographic reminiscent of heavy machinery. Feared by Queens. Beloved by Bishops.
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器使用让人联想到重型机械的花纹进行了自定义涂装。 王后之畏。主教之仁。
